step.name: initialise-catalogues
step.action: Create locales/<code>/messages.json (or .po). Pin library version. Wire to build pipeline.

step.name: externalise-strings
step.action: Replace hardcoded strings with t(key) calls. Add lint rule that blocks future regressions. Sweep with codemod where possible.
step.decision-gate: If a string genuinely cannot be translated (debug-only log), exempt explicitly and document.

step.name: author-icu-patterns
step.action: Convert plurals + gender-aware strings to ICU MessageFormat. Cover each locale's plural rules.

step.name: rtl-audit
step.action: Walk CSS; replace physical (left/right/margin-left) with logical (inline-start/end). Audit icons with direction.

step.name: wire-pseudo-loc-ci
step.action: Add CI step that runs the pseudo-loc transformer + renders pages. Fail on truncation or missing-key events.
